use_cases: Displaying file system hierarchies in developer tools or file managers
Rendering organizational charts for enterprise dashboards
Showing nested category structures for e-commerce product catalogs
Visualizing comment threads or nested replies in social platforms
Representing directory structures in code editors or IDE interfaces
ai_summary: A hierarchical tree data structure component for visualizing parent-child relationships in nested formats. Built with Radix UI primitives and shadcn/ui styling conventions, this component renders expandable/collapsible nodes for displaying file systems, org charts, or category hierarchies. Maintains minimal visual footprint while supporting complex nested data structures across desktop and mobile platforms.
